Neutron energy distribution of the nELBE neutron source
was measured with U-235 fission chamber.
Neutron intensity on target was ~2*10**4 n/s/cm**2.

used to measure gamma rays. Positioned at a distance
20 cm from the target and at an angle 125 deg relative
to the beam direction. The energy and efficiency
Time resolution of 10 ns (FWHM); flight path 6175 mm.
Gamma-ray spectra were extracted by setting gates of 12
channels width, corresponding to 11.72 ns, on the time
axis in the net matrix after background subtraction.
